hypothesis: Augmenting the LLM-guided synthesis planner with a neural surrogate trained to predict CALPHAD equilibrium phase fractions and JMA kinetic evolution will enable the agent to solve multi-phase Nb–O synthesis challenges (e.g., Challenge 2 and Challenge 3) with ≥80% success over 10 trials while reducing the number of full physics-simulator calls by ≥50% relative to the original LLM agent.
